trips.title: Trips Management
trips.subtitle: Plan and track your journeys
trips.confirmDeleteTrip: Are you sure you want to delete this trip? All steps will also be deleted.
trips.noTrips: No trips yet. Start planning your first adventure!
trips.selectTripHint: Select a trip to view its itinerary
trips.selectTripHintSub: Your journey details and timeline will appear here
trips.confirmDeleteStep: Are you sure you want to delete this step?

map.title: Pin on Map (Optional)
map.disabled: Map is not configured for this environment. You can still save the step without pinning.

fields.title: Trip Title
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: A short description of the trip...
fields.actionsHelp: One action per line (max {{maxItems}} items, {{maxChars}} chars per item).

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load trips. Please try again.
errors.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please check your inputs and try again.
errors.mapUnavailable: Map is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.pinIncomplete: Please pin both latitude and longitude or clear the pin.
errors.startDateInPast: Start date cannot be in the past. Please select today or a future date.
errors.endDateInPast: End date cannot be in the past. Please select today or a future date.
errors.startDateAfterEndDate: Start date must be before or equal to the end date.
errors.tripActionsListTooLarge: Too many actions in one list. Please remove extra items.
errors.tripActionTextTooLong: An action is too long. Please shorten it.
errors.stepStartDateBeforeTripStart: Step start date cannot be before the trip start date.
errors.stepEndDateAfterTripEnd: Step end date cannot be after the trip end date.
errors.stepStartDateAfterEndDate: Step start date must be before or equal to the step end date.
errors.stepDatesOverlap: This step overlaps another existing step. Please choose a different date range.

warnings.stepDatesOverlap: This step overlaps another existing step. You can still save it.
